news.title: Most Americans Now Say U.S. Foreign Policy Ignores the Interests of Other Countries
news.summary_en: Partisans hold different views on whether the U.S. contributes to peace, considers other countries’ interests and garners respect around the world.

news.title: What the data says about gun deaths in the U.S.
news.summary_en: The number of gun deaths in the U.S. fell for the third consecutive year in 2024 but remained among the highest annual totals on record.
